servinfo.title: Brake Flexible Hose and Pipe Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Brake Flexible Hose and Pipe Components

attention2.ptxt: Do not allow brake fluid to get on painted surfaces. Painted surfaces will be damaged by brake fluid. If any fluid is spilled, flush it with water immediately.

attention3.ptxt: This operation is not necessary when removing pipes connecting to brake master cylinder.

s1.ptxt: Remove dirt and foreign material from fittings at both flexible hose end and pipe end.
Remove brake flexible hose or pipe.

servinfosub.title: Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Brake Flexible Hose and Pipe Inspection

servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Make sure that steering wheel is in straight-forward position and brake flexible hoses are not twisted or kinked.
Make sure that brake flexible hoses is not in contact with any part of suspension.
Make sure that brake system operates properly and there is no fluid leakage.
